name: ai-agency
title: AI Agency
description: Browse AI Agency agents by division, view specialties and copy prompts.
author: marcin-91

commands.name: ai-agency
commands.title: AI Agency
commands.subtitle: AI Agency agents browser
commands.description: Browse AI Agency agents by division, view specialties and copy prompts.

commands.name: refresh-agents
commands.title: Refresh AI Agency Agents
commands.subtitle: Download latest agents from GitHub
commands.description: Refresh the cached AI Agency agents from the GitHub repository.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
